events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six trips around the sun for the legendary Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock God & Star Gazer
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Queen's Brian May! Rock legend, astrophysicist, and Red Special maestro – what a life!

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young for the incomparable Mick Jagger! The energy, the moves, the voice – what's your ultimate Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched, 'Video Killed The Radio Star'
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: MTV Changed Everything
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed music forever, kicking off with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star? We're still here!

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. Instantly iconic, era-defining. What's your favourite track from the album that launched a million singalongs?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. A truly defining moment in history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering The King, Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago today. His voice, his style, his impact – truly one of a kind.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot on September 7, 1996, and died from his injuries on September 13, 1996, in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years since we lost a true icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his profound impact on music and culture. His words still resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix died on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi's Enduring Sound
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who passed away 56 years ago today. His guitar changed the world.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Walking Into History
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That cover, those songs – a masterpiece from start to finish. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still fronting The Pretenders with that unmistakable voice.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad For It Birthday
angles.copy: Our kid Liam Gallagher turns 54 today! From Oasis anthems to a brilliant solo career, what's your favourite moment from the rock 'n' roll star?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK single released (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 24, 1975.

angles.name: Imagine A World
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' hit the UK as a single. A timeless message of peace that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple launched the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? Twenty-five years ago, Apple introduced a device that changed how we listen to music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the gadgets to the theme tunes, what's your favourite 007 moment or song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles, would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire generations.
